failure_modes.text: A clean story arc can outrun evidence quality and create more certainty than the proof warrants.
failure_modes.source_quote: Danger when story coherence outruns evidence quality
failure_modes.mitigation: Require the narrator to list what the story leaves out: every clean arc should be paired with the uncertainties, trade-offs, and alternative interpretations it compressed away.

failure_modes.text: Narrative compression can erase genuine uncertainty, trade-offs, or contingencies by turning them into false inevitability.
failure_modes.source_quote: Danger when the narrative compresses genuine uncertainty into false inevitability
failure_modes.mitigation: Test narrative claims against base-rate data: if the story implies inevitability, check whether the reference class of similar situations shows the same trajectory.

failure_modes.text: Motivated reasoners can use rhetorical skill to persuade themselves toward a desired conclusion instead of seeking objective truth.
failure_modes.mitigation: Appoint a designated counter-narrator who constructs an equally plausible story from the same evidence but with the opposite conclusion.

premortem_questions.text: Which missing evidence, trade-off, or contingency disappears if we tell this as one tidy story?
premortem_questions.source_quote: making contingencies, trade-offs, or missing evidence disappear

premortem_questions.text: Are we using the story to clarify causal meaning or to paper over uncertainty we do not want to face?
Can the core message still hold if we strip away every detail that does not serve the central purpose?
premortem_questions.source_quote: Focus on the Core and Concrete

heuristics.text: Use narrative to make causality memorable, but keep the operational point and evidence trace visible.
heuristics.source_quote: one clear line of meaning without losing the operational point

heuristics.text: Keep the core message concrete and small enough that people can act on it rather than just admire the story.
Seek the outside view before trusting a compelling story, especially when the arc feels too clean.

curation_notes.summary: The source is naturally chunk-ready on causal storytelling, adoption framing, and preventing clean arcs from erasing uncertainty or evidence gaps.
donor_drops: Did not preserve broader storytelling rhetoric because the raw source is stronger on evidence discipline and operational clarity.
open_questions: The first heuristic compresses several source passages on causal sequencing and operational point retention so the chunk stays compact.

allies: The raw ally surface is strongest on abstraction, simplification, and signaling because narrative makes causal meaning legible and sticky.
antagonists: The raw antagonist pressure is strongest on formal-reasoning, critical-thinking, and confirmation-bias because narrative quality can outrun proof quality.
structured_tensions: The source is clearest on anti-pattern pressure rather than explicit current-vocabulary tension blocks, so structured tensions should stay conservative.
